_comment: Declarative GA4 config-as-code. Edited here, applied to PROD by .github/workflows/ga-config.yml via analytics/reconcile-ga.js. See docs/ga-config.md. The count*/average* metric variants seen in the GA reporting API are auto-derived by GA from the base custom metric and must NOT be listed here.

customDimensions.description: Map name/id attached to gameplay events (e.g. match_start, round_complete).
Which landing CTA was clicked: play | join | create.
Whether the local player won the completed match (match_end).
Active map playlist on round_start/round_complete/match_end (featured | hardcore | pure | all | …). Lets gameplay be segmented by playlist and surfaces per-playlist skew.
Which page's invisible honeypot decoy a bot tripped (landing | play). Attached to bot_trap events.
Ad format on ad_shown/ad_complete/ad_skipped/ad_error: interstitial | rewarded.
Where the ad fired on ad_* events: between_matches (interstitial) | xp_2x (rewarded results-screen reward).
Which rewarded bonus a player claimed on reward_claimed: xp_2x (double match XP). Extensible to future rewarded options.
Which cosmetic was unlocked on cosmetic_unlocked (registry id, e.g. pizza, comet, border_ring).
Slot of the unlocked cosmetic on cosmetic_unlocked: cart | pattern | trail | border.
How the cosmetic was earned on cosmetic_unlocked: skin (level ladder) | achievement | seasonal.

customMetrics.description: Human players present in a match.
Bots present in a match (used to separate humans-only metrics).
XP credited on xp_earned (per-match award; also fired for the rewarded 2x bonus). averageXp drives the pacing retune.
Player level on level_up (level reached) and xp_earned (level after the award). Distribution over time shows curve pacing.
